target: Implement canonical pane metadata stamping and live drift verification primitives so later status, recovery, and profile migration work can identify panes deterministically.
invariants: Preserve the tmux-host repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and keep subsystem boundaries intact.
Do not reintroduce Dopemux-specific ownership into host core; Dopemux remains an integration profile.
Keep desktop, mobile, CLI, and tmux-native surfaces consuming the same derived state model where UI/state files are touched.
Do not broaden allowlists or mix unrelated cleanup into these packets.
Pane identity must be derived from explicit metadata, not guessed from screen position.
Metadata must be sufficient to support lookup, respawn, drift detection, and focus helpers.

commit.message: Implement pane metadata and drift verification

steps.task: Document the canonical pane metadata keys and add explicit metadata structures in the state and tmux layers.
requirements: Use explicit metadata keys for profile id, window id, pane id, adapter, role, cwd, respawn, and command override.
Keep the documentation and code names aligned exactly.

steps.task: Implement metadata stamping and lookup helpers so panes can be identified and queried deterministically after materialization.
requirements: Do not infer pane identity from layout position.
Keep lookup helpers narrow and metadata-driven.
Avoid recovery logic beyond what metadata stamping requires.

steps.task: Add drift verification tests and tmux fixtures that prove missing metadata and metadata mismatch are observable.
requirements: Keep tests targeted to metadata presence and drift detection.
Do not implement degraded-state policy here beyond test fixtures.
